prompt: Implement the temperature controller from the design in evals/files/temperature-controller-design.md. Use Python.

assertions.text: No scope creep: no public methods, classes, or features beyond what the design specifies
Complexity within limits: no function exceeds 50 lines, no cyclomatic complexity above 10, no nesting beyond 3 levels
Error handling: no null/None returns, invalid inputs handled per design (clamp or default), error messages include context
Immutable result objects: output uses frozen dataclass, namedtuple, or equivalent — no mutable state in returned values
SOLID signals: single responsibility per class, dependencies injected not hardcoded
Pure logic separated from I/O: state transition logic is pure (no I/O, no logging in core logic path)
No dead code: no commented-out code, no unused imports, no unreachable branches
Naming quality: names reveal intent, consistent vocabulary, domain terms used (deadband, hysteresis, not generic names)
